title: I Release Scarcity and Allow Limitless Wealth
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that wealth is finite
excerpt: A two-minute energy statement for clearing the grip of scarcity thinking. The release names the fixed-pie belief directly; the allow opens to wealth as something that expands rather than depletes when it circulates.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure draws from The Money Zone: How To Release Hidden Resistance, Allow Flow And Manifest Millions (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 57 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for when scarcity thinking has taken hold. The release names the fixed-pie belief, that wealth is a limited resource and that someone else's abundance leaves less for you. The allow opens to the opposite: wealth as a current that does not deplete when it moves.

I am ready to release all scarcity thinking, all belief that wealth is limited, and all fear that abundance circulating elsewhere leaves me with less. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow limitless wealth that expands rather than depletes, where the more that flows the more there is. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 57 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
